name: Foxtress™ OS
description:
When your body becomes a prison with a cheerful warden lodged in your skull, escape plan is anything but straightforward.

Will The Velvet Den's newest vixen be able to break free?

CW: forced transformation, feminization, and sexual slavery themes. All unleashed upon the player.

Not partuclarly my thing, but I find the scenario amusing. JLLM usually sucks at implementing it, so I'd recommend using a bigger model.
Still W.I.P., would appreciate a review.
UPD: Fixed naming discrepancy in the Intro.
creator: NeLepus
